backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing multi-line pickup lines with validation, storage, reporting, and usage‑guide generation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing a logo‑replacement task and related components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file listing summarized descriptions of all frontend source files and assets.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind base and dark‑mode color variables using OKLCH values with shared styling defaults.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app managing feed/submit views, search, random selection, and detail modal state.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky header with logo and navigation buttons for browsing, random selection, and submitting lines.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Page layout providing gradient backgrounds, header/footer, and content container.
frontend/src/components/PickupLineDetail: Modal showing a pickup line, copy function, usage guide, and reporting option.
frontend/src/components/PickupLineFeed.t: Feed view with hero section, search bar, filtering, loading skeletons, and reporting controls.
frontend/src/components/StickerIcon.tsx: Renders a 64px sticker icon by selecting a background sprite position based on index.
frontend/src/components/SubmitPickupLine: Form component for submitting a pickup line with validation, Instagram URL input, and mutation handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, handling login, logout, stored identities, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching, submitting, and reporting pickup lines through the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles, color variables, dark mode tokens, and utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/validation.ts: Validates pickup line text for length and minimum non-empty lines, returning structured errors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, typography, containers, radii, and animations.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s current version, goals, issues, and feature list for the RizzAssist Instagram-based pickup-line web app. Includes requirements for Instagram import, UI/theme fixes, moderation, browsing, and image updates.
